handler_boundary.side_effect_boundary: All side effects must pass through declared outbound ports.

preconditions: Command envelope validates against OES-007.
Command capability_id matches handler capability_id.
idempotency_key is present and scoped as required by OES-007.
actor_agent_reference resolves as AgentReference.
PolicyDecisionPort authorizes the actor, capability and target aggregate.
All reference fields are within the closed OES-006/OES-007 vocabulary.
No private founder source content is accessed unless a future OES-008-approved context artifact exists.
postconditions: Accepted command stages exactly one primary success event in the EventOutboxPort.
AuditRecordPort receives an audit record for accept/reject outcome.
Correlation and causation identifiers are preserved.
Rejected commands emit no primary success event.
No raw private context is written, emitted or learned by the handler boundary.

failure_boundary.failure_event_policy: No primary success event on rejection.
failure_boundary.client_error_contract: Return normalized rejection reason without leaking sensitive/private content.
